items.name_en: SAINT LAURENT Caviar Envelope Bag with V-shaped quilting. It continues the classic envelope silhouette but possesses the soul of an envelope, instantly boosting its practicality! Made from Italian original cowhide with exquisite craftsmanship, the exclusive custom metal YSL logo highlights individuality. The flap design ensures security. A small bag with large capacity, featuring 18 card slots, two bill compartments, two central compartments, and one zippered interior pocket.Model: 620280Dimensions: 22.5x14x4cm

items.name_en: Saint Laurent Envelope Bag is freshly out!! Simply beautiful to the heart. High-end goods, original hardware logo, first choice imported leather, texture is super amazing 😍😍 It is said everyone needs one, this style must be kept. Classic shape! It really catches the eye. Beauty, hurry up and grab it. The real thing is just too beautiful 💕 Size 23 15, Item No. 377828

items.name_en: Saint Laurent Mini 🆕 High-profile arrival🔥🔥🔥 Y-shaped badge envelope shoulder bag. Due to the bag's shape, the lining requires reverse stitching during production, so the leather quality is extremely high. Too brittle will wrinkle, too soft will lack structure and elasticity. After repeated prototyping, this boutique piece is finally presented to everyone💪💪Size: 20cm
